page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d3s.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance features 64 dedicated physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, meaning hyperthreading is not utilized. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

A defining characteristic of this server is its massive local storage capacity, consisting of 381,393 GB of HDD storage. This high-capacity local storage is paired with a high-speed network interface delivering a baseline bandwidth of 80 Gbps. The server operates on a KVM hypervisor and does not include any GPU accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The hardware profile presents a clear tradeoff: while it offers an exceptionally large local storage footprint suitable for massive data retention, the storage medium is HDD rather than SSD, which limits random IOPS performance compared to solid-state alternatives. This configuration is highly cost-efficient for workloads requiring vast storage capacity and high sequential throughput without the premium cost of SSDs. It is well-suited for large-scale data warehousing, distributed file systems, cold data storage, and big data analytics pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d3s.16xlarge is a storage-focused server built on the x86_64 architecture, featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz with one thread per core. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM and an exceptionally large local storage capacity of 381,393 GB utilizing HDD technology. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 80 Gbps but does not include GPU acceleration. The reliance on HDD storage represents a tradeoff, prioritizing massive capacity and sequential throughput over high random IOPS. This profile makes the server highly cost-efficient for storage-dense workloads such as distributed file systems, big data processing, and data warehousing.

tagline: A dedicated Intel Xeon server featuring massive local HDD storage capacity and high-speed baseline network bandwidth for data-intensive workloads.
